Video.summary: From “Nosferatu” to “Dracula,” everyone loves blood-sucking Vampires!
Video.title: Viva La Vampire!!

Video.summary: Passengers aboard a Trans-Siberian Express train must fight to stay alive after a prehistoric creature escapes captivity and begins a murder spree.
Video.title: Horror Express

Video.summary: From Hammer hits to Corman classics and more, these movies made Christopher Lee a horror icon.
Video.grandparentTitle: Christopher Lee: From Fangs to Frights
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When “Boxcar Bertha” and “Bloody Mama” took a trip to “Hollywood Boulevard,” they told some car thieves to “Eat My Dust,” and drove off like they were extras in “Death Race 2000.”
Video.title: The Corman Cinematic Universe

Video.summary: Giant monsters are on the rampage! Who will save us?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a look at the bizarre body horror and sci-fi films of director David Cronenberg.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Aliens and Androids have taken a “Fantastic Voyage” to Earth, and now we are all in “Altered States!”
Video.title: Aliens, Androids & Alternate Futures Vol. 1

Video.summary: “Invaders from Mars” have landed, hired ‘Robocop,” and are all now driving cross-country with “Speed Racer”
Video.title: Aliens, Androids & Alternate Futures Vol. 2

Video.summary: John Landis returns to Trailers from Hell to talk 'Citizen Kane' and more classic movies.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Image.alt: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild
The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Video.summary: TFH celebrates Alfred Hitchcock and the masterful storytelling that still keeps audiences on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: While “The Raven” may fly high, others less fortunate are subject to a “Premature Burial” inside “The Tomb of Ligeia”
Video.title: Corman, Price and Poe

Video.summary: In a “Deep Red” part of the country, “The Texas Chainsaw Massacre” made all of us squirm like “Three On A Meathook.”
Video.title: Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 1

Image.alt: Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 1
Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 1
Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 1

Video.summary: The nightmare never ends as your favorite filmmakers talk iconic horror movies.
Video.title: Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 2

Image.alt: Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 2
Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 2
Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 2

Video.summary: It was a “Night Of The Living Dead” that “I Walked With A Zombie” to finally meet “Rosemary’s Baby.”
Video.title: Hallowed Horror Vol. 1

Video.summary: It was an eerie night of "Dark Shadows” when I caught the “Brain Dead,” "Cemetery Man” looking just like a “Zombie.” He was caught “Burying The Ex” for her life insurance policy.
Video.title: Hallowed Horror Vol. 2

Video.summary: Werewolves and “Cat People” take over your screen and your nightmares!
Video.title: Terrifying Flix Featuring Furry Ferals

Video.summary: Hop in the DeLorean and return to the 80s, when slashers ruled the box office.
Video.title: Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 1

Image.alt: Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 1
Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 1
Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 1

Video.summary: The nightmare continues with 80s hits and cult classics with Cronenberg, Cujo, and more!
Video.title: Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 2

Image.alt: Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 2
Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 2
Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 2

Video.summary: Mutated beasts, creepy crawlies, and more movie monsters are coming to get you!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From monster mashups and horror hijinks, Bela Lugosi was much more than cinema’s greatest vampire.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Boris Karloff's portrayal of monsters and villains made him the undisputed king of 20th century horror.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Celebrate Lon Chaney Jr.’s big screen legacy of classic creatures and complex misfits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Monsters & Misfits: The Legacy of Lon Chaney Jr.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Looking back at the iconic films of horror director George A. Romero.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These iconic zombie movies are coming to eat your brain!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Enter the minds of the twisted geniuses who gave birth to monstrous creations and big screen horrors.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 1: Monstrous Minds
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Explore the dark side of scientific ambition, where unhinged minds push the boundaries of big screen horror.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 2: The Perils of Playing God
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Reckless experiments lead to monstrous results in these horrific Hollywood cult hits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 3: Experiments Gone Awry
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From 'Haunted Hill' to Corman classics, Vincent Price sent shivers down the spines of horror fans for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Vincent Price: Master of the Silver Scream
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shocked by the death of her spouse, a scheming widow hatches a bold plan to get her hands on the inheritance, unaware that she is targeted by an axe-wielding murderer who lurks in the family's estate. What mystery shrouds the noble house?
Video.title: Dementia 13

Video.summary: A young man turns to a witch doctor to lure the woman he loves away from her fiancé, but instead turns her into a zombie slave.
Video.title: White Zombie

Video.summary: Stung by the thought of losing her cosmetics empire, a woman goes to extreme and horrific lengths to find a cure for aging.
Video.title: The Wasp Woman

Video.summary: Vincent Price is throwing a party, and he’s invited five strangers with the promise of $10,000 each, if they can survive the night in the House on Haunted Hill. Director William Castle helmed this 1959 horror hit, which famously utilized the “Emergo” theatrical gimmick to spook moviegoers out of their seats.
Video.title: House on Haunted Hill
